gate_relationship.gate_ceiling_note: may_design_experiment is the strongest decision the gate can ever return; there is no may_run_model value in its type

experiment_question: Does pre-target player-season history from player_season_coverage_v0 improve Forecast's ability to predict the target season, without target-season leakage?

claim_distinctions.empirical_model_signal: not established; requires a future controlled run
claim_distinctions.production_readiness: not established; out of scope entirely

target_input_split.rule: any row with season >= target_season must be excluded from feature construction; future rolling-window designs must enforce the same rule for any target season

candidate_feature_families.boundary: coverage proxies only; never interpreted as active/inactive status
a missing prior season must never be treated as zero
snap_share/routes_run/route_participation/red_zone_* are unavailable in the source artifact and must stay null, never coerced to zero
never fabricated; null birth_date/rookie_year must keep season_age/career_year null for that row
team-of-record in weekly production rows only; not roster membership; not availability

baseline.teamstate_run2_reason: failed sanity control; real and shuffled Teamstate arms both worsened MAE vs run1_baseline (docs/reports/run2-teamstate-comparison-outcome-2026-06-29.md)
baseline.open_item: prefer evaluating against the real mounted TIBER-Data 2025 outcome population rather than the n=38 scaffold if available; implementation issue must state which population was used

next_implementation_issue_sketch.proposed_title: Forecast: implement player-history feature experiment scaffold
requirements: compact sha256-pinned mirror of 2022-2024 input-window rows, not the full artifact
one feature-extraction function per candidate family, independently toggleable
unit tests: 2025 input row rejected, missing seasons produce null not zero, age/career fabrication guards hold, team-context limitation preserved
no wiring into seasonalPprModel.ts numeric feature list yet
re-run the #99/#100 gate first if the TIBER-Data mirror needs updating

non_goals: no feature binding into production features
no promotion of the Data artifact
no 2025 summaries consumed as 2025 input features
